about: This file records WHY the commit carrying `Concausal-Fixes: 1c1cc028845190afe6f74dc53ba5c92ef8c423ae3728d60cdf061b11c8aa9113` was made: the job and step that failed and the resolved input versions it ran with (the conditions of the failure, not its cause). coordinate_id = sha256 over {pipeline_id, job, failed_step, sorted inputs}.
